rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation annexes for bindings.
For implementation contracts, use assign only for output features or declared auxiliary variables; do not place guarantees in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE type declarations use int, real, or bool; avoid invalid scalar type references.
Write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in type scopes.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
Align assumed types with actual expression types in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Use logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for boolean expressions in AGREE.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
